chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A permit issued under this subchapter must include:
the signature of the designated agent for the City of Laredo;
a statement of the kind of cargo being transported, the maximum weight and dimensions of the equipment, and the kind and weight of each commodity to be transported;

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: that the gross weight of the vehicle for which a permit is issued may not exceed 125,000 pounds; and

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: of any other condition on which the permit is issued;
a statement that the cargo may be transported in Webb County only over the roadways described by or designated under Section 623.382 (Issuance of Permits) ;
a statement that the permit does not authorize the transportation of the cargo on an interstate highway; and
the location where the cargo was loaded.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The City of Laredo shall report to the department all permits issued under this subchapter.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 870 (H.B.2861), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2015.
